tools.name: get_person
tools.descriptionHash: 17883eb50eb7bee352cec22a2227060ef05de0d940c74029960348388479d0RL, the permalink, and a ready-made Wikipedia {{cite web}} string.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Full-text search over Cincinnati public-meeting documents (agendas, minutes, transcripts). Returns matching documents with snippets and permalinks.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Fetch one meeting document by id — full text (transcripts include speaker turns with per-turn anchors). Long documents are truncated; the permalink has the full text.

tools.name: get_person
tools.description: Fetch one Cincinnati civic actor by name: Wikidata-grounded bio, voting record tally, and recent transcript statements, with permalink.

tools.name: list_people
tools.description: List every civic actor HometownWire tracks (current councilmembers with vote counts, plus Wikidata-known historical councilmembers).
